description_long: This object is a large, industrial-style fax machine with a rugged, metallic exterior finished in worn blue paint and visible signs of use. The front features a wide paper feed slot with a cylindrical roller and a metallic tray below, likely for collecting output documents. The left side displays a panel with three exposed gears, suggesting mechanical operation or maintenance access. The right side is equipped with a control panel that includes a small display screen, several buttons, and what appears to be a numeric keypad, all set above a metallic platform. The rear of the machine has a thick, flexible cable emerging from the base, indicating a need for substantial power or data connectivity. The overall design is robust, with reinforced edges and industrial warning stripes, making it suitable for heavy-duty urban or commercial environments.
description: A large, industrial fax machine with a rugged blue metal exterior, exposed gears, a control panel with a display and keypad, and a prominent paper feed slot.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main paper feed slot with a cylindrical roller, a metallic output tray, and warning stripes along the lower edge.
description_view_1: The left side reveals a vertical panel with three exposed gears and a slightly protruding section, emphasizing the machine's mechanical nature.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the paper feed slot, a thick cable emerging from the base, and additional warning stripes and panels.
description_view_3: The right side highlights the control panel with a display screen, several buttons, a numeric keypad, and a metallic platform beneath.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located on the upper right side of the machine, featuring a rectangular display screen at the top, a cluster of square and rectangular buttons below, and a numeric keypad arranged in a grid pattern. The controls are grouped closely together for easy access, with indicator lights and a small metallic section adjacent to the panel.
attribute_paper_tray_design: The paper tray is positioned at the front lower section, extending outward as a metallic platform with a textured surface, likely designed to catch and hold output documents. It appears fixed and robust, with no visible adjustable guides.
attribute_output_slot_location: The output slot is located at the front center, just above the metallic tray, with the paper emerging horizontally from the main body and guided by the roller.
attribute_handset_attachment: No telephone handset is visibly present or attached to the machine in any of the views.
